title: 奥洛拉攻略
summary: 简介：奥洛拉的机制其实很容易理解：对虚属性巨额伤害、需要合格的奶妈、还需要降低boss的输出。核心机制：悬丝万叶：给予玩家诅咒之盾会低输出（需要治疗50%以上的生命值才可以解除）、给于玩家狂言（我方回合造成伤害）、狂言驱散不够，就会触发一次AOE攻击。净琉璃：AOE伤害，若我方有debuff就触发一
content_json: [{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"简介：","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"奥洛拉的机制其实很容易理解：对虚属性巨额伤害、需要合格的奶妈、还需要降低boss的输出。","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"核心机制：","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":null,"src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_564/h_649/50364/2025/8/27/60c3938f-2b2a-463d-9562-a43779343acbpng","alt":null,"style":{"width":"298px","height":"343px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"悬丝万叶：给予玩家诅咒之盾会低输出（需要治疗50%以上的生命值才可以解除）、给于玩家狂言（我方回合造成伤害）、狂言驱散不够，就会触发一次AOE攻击。","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":null,"src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_435/h_230/50364/2025/8/27/26d4c6e2-5b88-4b78-b066-ac317b06c1dapng","alt":null,"style":{"width":"356px","height":"188px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"净琉璃：AOE伤害，若我方有debuff就触发一次1050%的巨额伤害。","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":null,"src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_641/h_239/50364/2025/8/27/bfa417a7-0b99-46e7-8d22-940dd44ab846png","alt":null,"style":{"width":"554px","height":"207px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"积怨：AOE，每释放一次，增加120%。","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":null,"src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_764/h_278/50364/2025/8/27/0a701280-02d1-444d-9f80-f5682a05a503png","alt":null,"style":{"width":"554px","height":"202px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"置于死地：我方死，它就狂暴。","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"因此我们可以总结为：我们要驱散+奶+减少BOSS的输出、速度。","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"角色解析：","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"奥洛拉专用必带奶妈是凌罗（活动赠送），1技能必须拉到满。","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":null,"src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_765/h_469/50364/2025/8/27/5f2ec0e1-a158-4a0c-b9fc-ba066fc1aad5png","alt":null,"style":{"width":"406px","height":"249px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"鲸祈：治疗的时候还能有75%概率驱散debuff,而且每一层都能治疗5%生命。","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":null,"src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_469/h_543/50364/2025/8/27/1bd67153-a20c-4417-b250-f116abc0f905png","alt":null,"style":{"width":"358px","height":"415px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"千音奏：延长所有buff一回合，身上的鲸祈也可以延长一回合。","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":null,"src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_764/h_609/50364/2025/8/27/210e0fc4-649b-426a-818a-af41127a68f6png","alt":null,"style":{"width":"418px","height":"333px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"完美音浪：免疫+大量治疗。","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"注意：凌罗不需要带生命装备就能大量治疗，穿防御装也能用。","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"特别指出：凌罗使用超新星（爆发治疗）","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":null,"src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_426/h_543/50364/2025/8/27/7bfe518e-8eda-49f4-a4b6-27c4b8f03462png","alt":null,"style":{"width":"426px","height":"543px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"而且最好附带治愈","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":null,"src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_816/h_565/50364/2025/8/27/1255cc31-50af-4846-8432-0c20c94e6877png","alt":null,"style":{"width":"419px","height":"291px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"和进化庇荫","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":null,"src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_816/h_566/50364/2025/8/27/e6138f09-ccab-4f30-86e8-2d7f20ed178fpng","alt":null,"style":{"width":"437px","height":"303px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"特别推荐一个SR：蝰蛇","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"蝰蛇的3技能是个很好的debuff技能。可以降低boss的输出和速度","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":null,"src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_780/h_523/50364/2025/8/27/50488106-9444-40bf-847a-a06a1336fe77png","alt":null,"style":{"width":"398px","height":"267px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"2技能可以降低boss的暴击伤害：","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":null,"src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_452/h_563/50364/2025/8/27/fab546c6-fd1c-4abe-8faa-f5a466a977a4png","alt":null,"style":{"width":"342px","height":"425px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"1技能能配合2技能，可以频繁释放大招：","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":null,"src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_757/h_587/50364/2025/8/27/86cb7dc2-3945-4bda-b100-ad4ed6746e62png","alt":null,"style":{"width":"413px","height":"320px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"蝰蛇堪称万用。","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"分难度攻克：","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"危机3之前，boss都不会有开局免疫，可以用破甲+输出的思路进行攻克","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":null,"src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_879/h_472/50364/2025/8/27/15115a8a-b470-49a9-93d7-79e27e0af43apng","alt":null,"style":{"width":"553px","height":"297px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"危机3之后，boss就会开局自带免疫，驱散+破甲的思路就不太可能了，因为奥洛拉本身还是很肉的。危机3之后就要有意识地使用凌罗+蝰蛇的组合了，因为缬草也很百搭，所以就组成了奥洛拉的基本核心单元：凌罗（驱散+治疗）+蝰蛇（降低攻击和速度）+缬草（治疗+无敌+巨额护盾）。之后你能走多远就全看凌罗、蝰蛇的练度了。缬草可以换成米娅，但是我不建议，因为米娅虽然可以驱散boss的免疫，但是自己是SSR卡，没办法将金块给她，她在PVP中并不强势，所以我还是推荐使用缬草。","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"到了这一步，逻辑已经很清晰了，常规队伍就是以凌罗、蝰蛇和缬草为基本逻辑进行的。","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":null,"src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_991/h_456/50364/2025/8/27/6d79859b-00a1-4c40-9f9c-9beab9b665d5png","alt":null,"style":{"width":"553px","height":"255px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"炼狱同理，只不过对于装备要求将会更高：","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":null,"src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1004/h_454/50364/2025/8/27/8a2cc81d-2619-44bd-be0e-0cad8de955c9png","alt":null,"style":{"width":"554px","height":"251px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"最后插播一下炼狱速刷队：","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","key":null,"src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1042/h_486/50364/2025/8/27/b329fdc8-97fd-4a5c-b48c-73cba2dedd92png","alt":null,"style":{"width":"554px","height":"259px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":"逻辑是：凌罗治疗驱散诅咒之盾，海茵驱散，黛纳破甲+增伤，彼安汀增伤，然后莉拉姆大招，最后彼安汀拉莉拉姆起来收尾。","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":"","text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":"","text":"#伊瑟 #伊瑟攻略#伊瑟公测定档0925"}]},{"type":"paragraph","customClass":null,"lineHeight":"","textAlign":"","indent":"","children":[{"text":" ","color":"","fontSize":"10.5pt","bold":false,"bgColor":""}]}]

hot_content_strategies.name: 伊瑟！全角色！节奏榜！持续更新！
Re:从零开始的异格者生活（自建开荒入门攻略）
